news.title: More missiles or no war? How markets are reading Trump's latest signals
news.description: Indian markets plunged Thursday as President Trump's threats of escalating strikes on Iran spooked investors. The Sensex dropped significantly, mirroring a broader selloff across emerging Asian market

news.title: Recyclekaro plans Rs 240 crore fundraise, weighs IPO amid expansion push
news.description: Recyclekaro plans to raise Rs 240 crore and explore an IPO as it expands e-waste and lithium-ion recycling capacity. The company is scaling operations and moving towards high-purity material recovery

news.title: 抖音生活服务组织架构大调整，中小商家更重要了｜独家
news.description:
文｜李小霞
 编辑｜乔芊 杨轩
 36氪独家获悉，近期抖音生活服务完成了浦燕子接任后的第二次大的组织架构调整。
 此次调整根据商户规模重新分为线上部门和线下部门。
 月GMV5万以上的客户被放到线上部门，分为KA（月GMV10万以上）、自助（月GMV在5-10万）、酒旅三个版块。其中前二者又分别按行业细分为餐饮、到店综合。
 月GMV5万以下的客户被放到线下部门。线下则按照区域划分为北区、南区、东
